data.title: RED — Test validate.sh lint check catches hardcoded model IDs
data.description:
Write tests/scripts/test-model-id-lint.sh testing:
1. File with hardcoded claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 in plugins/dso/ → detected, exits non-zero
2. File with hardcoded claude-sonnet-4-6 → also detected
3. dso-config.conf excluded from scan
4. .test-index excluded from scan
5. tests/ directory excluded from scan (fixture files contain model IDs legitimately)
6. File without hardcoded IDs passes

TDD: RED test. Tests fail because lint check does not exist in validate.sh yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (RED-marked tolerated)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-model-id-lint.sh
- [ ] RED marker
  Verify: grep -q '\[test-model-id-lint\]' .test-index
